text:
Created attachment 241218
Patch file

Update to 2.7.8

Upstream stated Ruby 2.7 reached its EoL on March 30. So update deprecation message and adjust EXPIRATION_DATE to one month after.

ReleaseNotes:   https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/news/2023/03/30/ruby-2-7-8-released/
MFH:            2023Q1
